hero.title: AI That Answers Customers
hero.subtitle: Jugl handles your Website, Instagram, and WhatsApp messages automatically. Your customers get instant answers. You get your time back.

features.title: Add your website
features.description: Just paste your URL. Jugl reads your site and learns about your business in minutes.

features.title: Customize your AI
features.description: Choose your tone, set business hours, decide when to hand off to you. Takes 5 minutes.

features.title: Go live on every channel
features.description: Turn on WhatsApp, Instagram, web chat, and more. One click each.

secondarySection.title: Works everywhere
secondarySection.description: Reach customers on the channels they prefer, without juggling multiple dashboards.
